title: AuraBoost
description: AuraBoost is a unique modpack that was created specifically to improve gameplay in Minecraft.
body:
# Description
**Always wanted** to get the most out of the game, but your computer's not powerful enough? 

**Meet us!** A new global project of Auranite studio - AuraBoost.

**"AURANITE" in Telegram:**
**https://t.me/auranite_official**

**AuraBoost** is a unique modpack designed to improve the gameplay of Minecraft.

**The modpack contains all** the necessary mods, resource packs and settings that allow the player to significantly increase the performance of the game and enjoy it without any problems or inconveniences.

## Features
**"AuraBoost"** has other features besides the strong performance boost:

**1. Availability** on almost all versions of minecraft, starting from 1.8.9 and ending with the latest version on downloaders such as: Forge, Fabric, Quilt.

**2. Developed on the basis of the best** optimising mods that work and combine with each other perfectly.

**3. Proper customisation** of configs, other internals and settings provided by Minecraft itself.

**4. Compatibility** with a huge number of existing mods, which makes it possible to play comfortably not only in vanilla Minecraft, but also on existing modpacks/projects.

**5. Constant updating:** support for new versions of the game, replenishing its range of lesser-known versions and loaders, updating mods and the like.

## How to install "AuraBoost"
  1. Download Minecraft of the required version
  2. Clear the ‘mods’ folder in .minecraft
  3. Transfer all contents from the ‘AuraBoost’ folder to .minecraft with replacement
  4. Start Minecraft and enjoy the game=)
  5. Don't forget to support us by subscribing to the channel TELEGRAM: @auranite_official

## Authors of the project on social media:

**Telegram:
https://t.me/auranite_official**

**Discord:
https://discord.gg/F6BHrXMVZ4**


Remember that you can always download the most up-to-date version of the project only in our Telegram bot: @auranite_bot
